subject: Re: Prairie Valley Foods group filing - review options
snippet: Standard filing review is no cost; optional expedited filing review is a $275 portal fee...
body:
Hi Christopher,

To confirm the filing options for Prairie Valley Foods:
- Standard filing review is included at no cost.
- The optional expedited filing review is processed through the carrier portal for a $275 processing fee.
Either way, the portal will not accept your package until the CFO countersignature is on file for the renewal attestation.

Best,
Group Filing Desk
UnitedHealthcare Employer Services

body:

Elena
